title: rich decadent tunisian chickpeas pilaf
description: a buttery, fluffy, and nutritious tunisian dish flavored with dark chocolate, vegan-friendly, and perfect for hangover cure.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality extra virgin olive oil

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the chickpeas, ground flaxseed, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
stir to combine, then add the chocolate chips.
continue cooking, stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes, until the chickpeas are coated in the spice mixture.
cover the saucepan with a lid or parchment paper and cook for 10-12 minutes, until the chickpeas are tender.
fluff the pilaf with a fork, then serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
